title: Withdraw ₳605,000 for A free Native Asset CDN for Cardano Developers

rationale.summary: Vote: ABSTAIN. For this TreasuryWithdrawals (enacted), evidence quality was insufficient for a reliable YES or NO decision. Decisive reason: a treasury action without a complete deep-research dossier cannot be voted directionally without pretending certainty. Weighed against it: the proposal substantiates "This treasury withdrawal funds A free Native Asset CDN for Cardano Developers which will provide the following services: Building reliable infrastructure to display Cardano native assets (NFTs &FTs) efficiently, at scale, can cost upwards of $100,000 and ta..." though 8 review blocker(s) remain open. sections.title: Treasury analysis
findings: Six-month treasury flow regime: unsustainable (basis: total inflow (tau + donations) vs enacted withdrawals)
sections.conclusion: Treasury votes require a higher bar because they consume shared ADA and create precedent.

sections.title: Risk review
sections.conclusion: Risk is not a side note; unmitigated execution or governance risk can dominate an otherwise attractive proposal.

sections.title: Synthesis

The public rationale should name the decisive section and the strongest counterargument.
